category_sources: source_facts.description says Infocom-style interactive fiction player; official GitLab README/wiki identify Frotz project documentation.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is frotz; official GitLab project is DavidGriffith/frotz.
docs_sources: Official GitLab README points readers to the project wiki; README is official fallback documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://gitlab.com/DavidGriffith/frotz, so repo returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description describes an Infocom-style interactive fiction player; source_facts.executables lists command-line executables dfrotz, frotz, and sfrotz.
